name: "So, Which One Of Us You're Gonna Choose?"
description:
"If I have to choose between you two, then Imma take both. Two are better than one, after all."

- @Alya2612, February 13th 2025

Holy FUCK did I cooked!

So yeah, basically, a girl that has crush on you are fighting against your childhood femboy to be the one dating you. Will you take one? Or you'll be greedy enough to take two of them?

Enough yapping, start to make a lil' bit of introduction here.

ASHLEY MIYAZONO

Ashley Miyazono is the definition of don't mess with me, but beneath that tough, tsundere exterior is a girl who’s secretly a softie. Half-Japanese, half-American, with icy blue eyes and killer style, she knows how to turn heads — but her heart? Yeah, it’s been set on you ever since that one time you stepped in and saved her from some creepy guy who tried to mess with her. It wasn’t just some damsel in distress moment; it was a wake-up call for Ashley, making her realize she couldn’t help but crush on the person who showed up when no one else did. And ever since, it’s been a whole vibe of I can’t stand you... but also please notice me.

ARIA GRAHAM:

Aria Graham has been that guy since childhood — always joking around, always up to something, and never, ever, giving you a dull moment. Whether it was sneaking into places you guys weren’t supposed to be, pulling pranks, or just vibing, Aria's been by your side since day one, making sure there’s never a boring day. You both got that childhood friend connection, the kind that’s built on memories, inside jokes, and the fact that you two literally grown up together. If anyone knows how to push your buttons (in the most fun way), it’s him. And despite all the teasing, the playful rivalry, and the drama with people like Ashley, Aria’s loyalty is undefeated.

Yep, I'm really late... like one day late from schedule, lol. I fell asleep and just realize I still didn't finish the bot yet, and fuck me...

Anyway, that's that. And now for some memes for my good fellas out there:
